summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after major changes since iteration_16. All critical features verified working: VesselExecutionPage split routing, 7 tabs with PIR green active state, AccountingPage RBAC fixes for accountant role, Draft Documents bulk upload, Payment tab with SWIFT upload, Bank Statement edit, and all navigation flows.

minor.issue: piraccount credentials do NOT work - correct accountant credentials are pir.accounts/pir123

passed_tests: Login flow: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials (salih.karagoz/salih123) returns token
Login flow: POST /api/auth/login with accountant credentials (pir.accounts/pir123) returns token
Login redirects to /trades dashboard after successful login
Contracts page (/trades): Table loads with 3 Ongoing, 1 Pending, 1 Completed contracts
Trade Detail page (/trades/:id): Loads with Delete button, Edit button, GAFTA Term field
Vessel Execution list view (/documents): Shows Ongoing (3), Pending Vessel Nomination (1), Completed (8) tables
Vessel Execution list view: Broker column present after Buyer in all tables
Vessel Execution detail view (/documents/:tradeId): Loads with all 7 tabs
Vessel Execution tabs: Vessel Nomination, Documentary Instruction, Draft Documents, B/L Details, Shipment Appropriation, Shipment Documents, Payment
Vessel Execution active tab styled in PIR green (#1B7A3D) - rgb(27, 122, 61)
Vessel Execution detail: Back button returns to list view
Draft Documents tab: Bulk upload zone present, 13 required document rows displayed
Draft Documents tab: Shows 6/13 Uploaded, 7 Missing status
Payment tab: Payment date picker present
Payment tab: SWIFT copy upload/view functionality working
Accounting page (/omega): Loads for admin with Incoming/Outgoing/Bank Statements tabs
Accounting page: Loads for accountant role WITHOUT crashing (RBAC fix verified)
Accountant RBAC: GET /api/vendors returns 200 (read access granted)
Accountant RBAC: GET /api/bank-accounts returns 200 (read access granted)
Accountant RBAC: POST /api/vendors returns 403 (write access denied - correct)
Bank Statements: Edit endpoint PUT /api/bank-statements/:id works
Brokerage Invoices page (/commissions): Loads with filter dropdowns and commission data
Market Data page (/market-data): All 5 tabs load (Indications, CBOT & Exchange Rates, Turkish Exchanges, Tenders, Coaster Freights)
Port Line-Ups page (/port-lineups): Daily and Monthly tabs present with vessel data
Calendar page (/calendar): Loads with events, multi-day events visible (Ramazan Bayramı spans 20-22)
Settings page (/settings): Profile info and reference data tabs working
Sidebar navigation works for all pages
No random logouts during navigation (axios interceptor fix verified)
Backend API: GET /api/trades returns trades list
Backend API: GET /api/trades/{id} returns trade details
Backend API: GET /api/events returns events
Backend API: GET /api/invoices returns invoices
Backend API: GET /api/market/prices returns market prices
Backend API: GET /api/market/tenders returns tenders
Backend API: GET /api/port-lineups/dates returns dates
Backend API: GET /api/port-lineups/summary returns summary
critical_code_review_comments: VesselExecutionPage routing split working correctly: /documents for list, /documents/:tradeId for detail
AccountingPage RBAC fix verified - accountant can access vendors and bank-accounts for read operations
Axios interceptor fix working - no random logouts observed during testing
Active tab styling uses correct PIR green (#1B7A3D)
Draft Documents tab shows proper upload zone and document status tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features from the review request have been verified working. VesselExecutionPage has split routing: /documents shows list view with 3 tables (Ongoing, Pending Vessel Nomination, Completed), /documents/:tradeId shows detail view with 7 tabs. Active tab is styled with PIR green (#1B7A3D). AccountingPage RBAC fix allows accountant role to access vendors and bank-accounts for read operations. Correct accountant credentials are pir.accounts/pir123 (NOT piraccount). All 25 backend API tests pass. All UI pages load correctly with proper data.
